$schema_note: Tracks single files vendored from pinokiocomputer upstream repos. Run scripts/sync_vendor.py to refresh dest files + manifest.lock.json from source_repo/ref/source_path. Do NOT hand-edit files under vendor/ — edits will be overwritten on next sync.

files.purpose: Upstream's official pterm-first agent skill, installed by pinokiod itself into ~/.agents/skills/pinokio/SKILL.md on every machine running Pinokio. Covers runtime control of already-installed apps: search, launch, status polling, using apps (direct API calls or generated clients), logs, parallel mode. pko's own skills MUST NOT duplicate this logic for the single-local-instance case — when pterm/the pinokio skill is available, pko skills should defer to it. pko owns what this skill does not: remote/multi-instance orchestration, profile management, and operations run from outside any single Pinokio box.

Canonical app-authoring guide stamped into every new Pinokio launcher project (also rendered to CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, etc. by proto's agents.js module). Covers PINOKIO_HOME destination resolution, app-launcher vs plugin-launcher structure, script API reference, and best practices. This is the design source for pko's create-app command and informs pko's install command's destination-resolution logic.

Stable public CLI command reference for pterm, the Pinokio author's own Node.js CLI. ADR-005 (Option 1): pko does not depend on pterm at runtime, but treats its source as an authoritative protocol reference to de-risk Phase 2-4 implementation (community registry search, install/download, start/stop, status, logs) since pterm already talks to the same pinokiod HTTP/WS API pko wraps in pure Python.

Target/base-URL resolution logic (resolveHttpBaseUrl, resolveWsBaseUrl, ~/.pinokio/config.json access field, DEFAULT_BASE_URL fallback chain). Reference for pko's own connect/profile/discover target resolution to stay consistent with upstream conventions.

Parses pinokio:// URIs, local file paths, and qualified app IDs (appId@host) into control targets. Reference for how pko should parse/resolve app references consistently with the ecosystem convention, particularly for any future pinokio:// ref support in pko.

Script.start/stop implementation — the authoritative reference for pinokiod's WebSocket RPC message shapes used by pko's still-unimplemented start/stop/install commands (PLAN.md Phase 4). Removes guesswork pko previously had to do by reading only pinokiod's server-side source.
WebSocket RPC transport layer (kernel.* method call framing). Reference for pko's own WebSocket client implementation in Phase 4.

HTTP-based utility command implementations (status, logs, search, registry search, star/unstar, which, home) — reference for the exact HTTP endpoints/payloads pko's own client.py should call for Phase 2-3 features not yet implemented.
